headline: Enphase Energy, Inc. (ENPH) and Ensol Collaborate to Expand Home Battery Adoption in France
summary: Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) is one of the Goldman Sachs Solar and Green Energy Stocks: Top 10 Stock Picks. On March 16, 2026, Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) announced a joint venture with Ensol to increase IQ Battery deployments in France through a subscription model starting at €30 per month. Ensol installs and administers IQ Battery […]

headline: Enphase Energy Partnerships Test Storage Growth Against Valuation And Volatility
summary: Enphase Energy and Ensol have introduced a battery subscription offering in France with virtual power plant integration. In the U.S., Enphase Energy has formed new partnerships to grow residential and small commercial solar plus battery projects. The company is also participating in a virtual power plant program in Texas focused on demand response. For investors tracking NasdaqGM:ENPH, these moves come as the stock trades at $43.28, with a 28.2% return year to date and a 1.6% gain over the...
